usage: createRouteBlk [-help] [-cutLayer <layerId|{layerId list}|all>] [-drcRegionLayer <layerId|{layerId list}|all>] [-inst <name>] [-layer <layerId|{layerId list}|all>] [-mask <integer>] [-noWrongWay] [-pushdown] [-trimMetalLayer <layerZ|{layerZ list}|all>] {-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -cover | -polygon {{x1 y1} {x2 y2}...} | -boxList {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} } [-exceptpgnet | -pgnetonly | -partial <integer>] [-spacing <float> | -designRuleWidth <float>] [-fills | -exceptFill ] [-name <blk> | -prefixOn ]

options.name: -boxList
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} a list of boxes that defines a list of one or more rectangles.

options.name: -exceptFill
options.description: set 'exceptFill' attribute. Specifies that the routing blockage is to be applied to other all net routings but not on metal fills

options.name: -mask
options.description: specify the mask which will only be blocked.

options.name: -noWrongWay
options.description: set 'noWrongWay' attribute. Only real routing wires will honor it and do not have jogs in this region.

options.name: -partial
options.description: create partial routing blockage with routing specified density

options.name: -pgnetonly
options.description: set 'pgnetonly' attribute. Only PG nets will honor the created routing blockage.

options.name: -polygon
options.description: coordination of each vertex of the shape.

options.name: -pushdown
options.description: set 'pushdown' attribute. Specify the blockage is pushed down into the block from the top level of the design
